rulings.Case Title: ISABEL WISKIND VS. WELLS FARGO BANK, N.A. ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 7, 2017 line 1. PLAINTIFF ISABEL WISKIND's MOTION FOR WITHDRAWAL OF ATTORNEY OF RECORD OFF CALENDAR. Counsel failed to use Mandatory Form MC-052. The non-complaint declaration filed in lieu of form MC-052 appears to address a different action. See Declaration of Joe Della Santina referencing Ms. Wiskind as Defendant; fully executed settlement agreement; and masking. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: ANNE KRAJEWSKI HARBERT VS. YEVA INC.
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion To Set Aside Judgment Order And To Reopen Case; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Declaration Of Plaintiff; Declaration Of Gary Saunders; Declaration Of Dustin Krogh
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 7, 2017 line 2. PLAINTIFF ANNE HARBERT's Motion To Set Aside Judgment Order And To Reopen Case; GRANTED. The Court will treat this motion as a motion for mandatory relief for counsel's failure to comply with the tentative ruling rule on July 19, 2017. See Declaration of Dustin Krogh. Such failure prevented any substantive hearing regarding the original tentative ruling issued on July 19, 2017. Argument addressing Huh v. Wang (2007) 158 Cal.App.4th 1406 could have been made and considered on July 20, 2017; it was not considered due to counsel's failure to comply with the rules. Dustin Krogh and Saunders Law Group are to compensate Defendants for the fees incurred in opposing the motion filed on August 7, 2017. Defendant's counsel to present declarations and billing statements by 9:00 a.m. on September 7, 2017. Under the circumstances of this case a referral to the State Bar is warranted as to both Plaintiff's current counsel (1) Saunders Law Group, Gary Saunders, Jenny Shin, Gerald Fritz and Dustin Krogh and (2) Plaintiff's former counsel, RA and Associates, Romel Ambarchyan. A copy of this order and a copy of the moving papers and declarations shall be served on the California State Bar by the clerk of the Court. Plaintiff to file a First Amended Complaint no later than September 7, 2017. Plaintiff to prepare a proposed order in conformity with the tentative ruling and present it for execution at the time of the hearing. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: LAN B. LEE VS. TYLER MCAFEE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Motion For Attorney Fees; Mpa; Declarations; Request For Judicial Notice
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 7, 2017 line 4. DEFENDANTs TYLER MCAFEE and HARI KHALSA's Motion For Attorney Fees GRANTED in the amount of $32,785 in reasonable attorney's fees for 83 hours at $395/hour. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: MICHAEL J. TURON VS. JENNIFER RODRIGUE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Prevailing Party Attorney Fees After Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 7, 2017 line 5. PLAINTIFF MICHAEL TURON's Motion For Prevailing Party Attorney Fees After Judgment GRANTED in the amount of $62,964. Settlement Agreement is not ambiguous. The Agreement allowed for a judgment including attorney's fees without any limitations. It also separately allowed for enforcement of the Settlement Agreement attorney's fees. As is evident from the settlement agreements attached to Mr. Spalding's declaration, when parties desire to limit the recovery of attorney's fees to enforcement fees, while each side bears all other fees and costs, the parties expressly so provide in the agreements. This was not done here. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: FREDDIE NEW VS. DARRYL WILLIAMS ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 7, 2017 line 6. DEFENDANTs DARRYL WILLIAMS and BRANDI FULLER's DEMURRER TO 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT OFF CALENDAR, insufficient notice per CCP 1005 and 1013. = (501/REQ)

rulings.Case Title: NATHAN BUIKEN VS. ANTONIO LOPEZ ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for September 7, 2017 line 7. DEFENDANT ANTONIO LOPEZ's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Triable issue of fact as to whether Defendant is a tenant at "1538 Shafter," "1538 Shafter, Unit #A," or "1538 Shafter, Unit #A, first front room." = (501/REQ)
